actionUnits.condition: VRAgent is a PrefabInstance (guid=7536e93f5e86cf542ad33bdf02ea7b09) and is tagged Player. It has CapsuleCollider and BoxCollider (both IsTrigger=1) but no Rigidbody. Script source for component fileID=6214257061678146550 is missing, and no m_Calls / UnityEvent bindings are provided in the extracted MonoBehaviour settings. Also Prefab modification sets m_IsActive=0 in this scene, so ensure VRAgent is activated by the test harness before attempting any runtime trigger interactions. Since no callable public no-arg methods are discoverable from the provided meta, no explicit method calls can be specified yet.

Test AgentBridge server lifecycle and network behavior. Scene meta shows AgentBridge MonoBehaviour (script guid: 936d9149ac1e25949911d561695a271a, component fileID: 75889659) with port=6400 and autoStart=1, so StartServer() should have been invoked in Awake automatically. Manually trigger StopServer() to validate it stops listener/stream safely and logs "Server stopped" even when no client is connected. (No m_Calls UnityEvent bindings are provided for this object.)

After StopServer(), manually trigger StartServer() to validate server can restart cleanly on same port (6400) and accept connections again. Expected: log "TCP Server listening on 127.0.0.1:6400" and accept thread starts without exceptions.

KeySocket has KeyUnlockReceiver (MonoBehaviour fileID=746320263, script guid=c87167e8859f9dc4d98e818aab1910b1). In runtime this script listens to XRSocketInteractor.selectEntered and calls doorController.Unlock() once, then changes socketIndicatorRenderer.sharedMaterial to unlockedMaterial. Because selectEntered is normally fired by inserting an XR interactable into the socket, we only manually trigger if no grabbable 'key' interactable is available or insertion cannot be simulated. Expected: DoorController referenced by fileID=1342851255 is unlocked and indicator renderer (fileID=864473226) uses unlockedMaterial (guid=7c38ca2c8b284d9439e0aeac6916567c).

Manually invoke DrawerController.Toggle() (script guid=181a93ff91c685946b20f54ea877474b, MonoBehaviour fileID=659474796; openDistance=0.42, animationSpeed=5). This covers the Toggle() state flip and log. Drawer has BoxCollider (659474798) but no XRSimpleInteractable wiring info (m_Calls) provided, so trigger directly for coverage.

Wait ~1s after Toggle to allow Update() to Lerp transform.localPosition toward openLocalPosition (closedLocalPosition + (0,0,-0.42)) given animationSpeed=5. Expect local Z to decrease from initial 0.26 toward approx -0.16 over time.
Invoke Toggle() again to cover closing path (isOpen true->false) and corresponding log output.
Wait ~1s to allow Update() to Lerp back toward closedLocalPosition (initial localPosition x=0,y=0.45,z=0.26). Expect local Z to increase back toward 0.26 over time.

Manually invoke LightSwitchController.Toggle() (script guid=afb52d2e54ea1614294036b01b20569f, MonoBehaviour fileID=1618227218). Serialized refs: controlledLight fileID=340544673, switchRenderer fileID=1618227215, litMaterial guid=1529549f84e419e409d02128368bed06, unlitMaterial guid=25cacebe91df7a9478efb7354f75efdf. Covers Toggle(): flips isOn, sets controlledLight.enabled when not null, calls UpdateVisual() to swap switchRenderer.sharedMaterial, emits debug log.
Invoke Toggle() a second time to cover the opposite branch/state transition (ON->OFF or OFF->ON), re-validating controlledLight.enabled toggling and material swap back.

DoorPivot has DoorController (MonoBehaviour fileID=1342851255, script guid=df6ed34bdc198f845aeef08129f7eb31) with startLocked=1, so Toggle()/Open() should have no effect until Unlock() is called. Manually trigger Unlock() to satisfy the precondition for later interactions (e.g., XR selectEntered wired Toggle) once child/interactable info is provided.

Manual trigger to cover LightSwitchController.Toggle() (script guid afb52d2e54ea1614294036b01b20569f, MonoBehaviour fileID 1894443799). LightSwitch_Room1 has BoxCollider (1894443797) enabling trigger interaction. Expected: controlledLight(fileID 590520313).enabled toggles; switchRenderer(fileID 1894443796).sharedMaterial set to litMaterial/unlitMaterial; Debug.Log emitted.

Trigger a second time to cover both toggle paths (ON->OFF or OFF->ON) and verify material swap reverses. Same MonoBehaviour fileID 1894443799; expects controlledLight 590520313 toggles back and switchRenderer 1894443796 uses the opposite material asset (guid 1529549f84e419e409d02128368bed06 vs guid 25cacebe91df7a9478efb7354f75efdf).
